headline: Zoetis to Host Webcast and Conference Call on Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: PARSIPPANY, N.J., June 25, 2026--Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) will host a webcast and conference call at 8:30 a.m. (ET) on Thursday, August 6, 2026. Chief Executive Officer Kristin Peck and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Wetteny Joseph will review second quarter 2026 financial results and respond to questions from financial analysts.
